exhibits.name: List of Outlets
exhibits.notes: 56 pages, ~4,439 current franchised salons with names, addresses, phone numbers

exhibits.name: Lists of Former Franchisees
exhibits.notes: Former franchisees who left system in most recent fiscal year or no contact in 10 weeks

exhibits.name: Independent Franchisee Organizations
exhibits.notes: Independent organizations that asked to be included

exhibits.name: Financial Statements
exhibits.notes: 22 pages. Audited balance sheets, income statements, cash flows, shareholders equity, notes. Dec 31, 2024/2023/2022. Clean opinion.

exhibits.name: Master Development Agreement
exhibits.notes: Multi-unit development agreement for exclusive DMA.

exhibits.name: Innovative Computer Software – Styleware Software Suite Agreement
exhibits.notes: POS software license agreement with ICS.

exhibits.name: Heartland Payment Systems – Merchant Processing Agreement
Stored Value Systems, Inc. – Participation Agreement
Foundation Technologies, LLC – Salon X Store Service Agreement
exhibits.notes: Network and hardware managed services agreement.

exhibits.name: Automated Clearing House Authorization
exhibits.notes: ACH authorization for automatic fee collection.

exhibits.name: State Addenda
exhibits.notes: 41 pages. Addenda for CA, HI, IL, MD, MI (front matter pp.6-7), MN, NY, ND, RI, VA, WI. Covers FDD addenda, FA addenda, MDA addenda, general releases, and Three Star addenda for applicable states.

exhibits.name: State Agencies and Agents for Service of Process
exhibits.notes: Contact information for state franchise regulators.

exhibits.name: Data Processing Addendum
exhibits.notes: Data processing addendum for privacy compliance.

exhibits.name: SBA Franchisor Addendum
exhibits.notes: Uniform Franchisor Addendum for SBA lending.
